sentences.arabic: انْتَهَتْ دِينَا مِنَ الْعَمَلِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الْخَامِسَةِ مَسَاءً.
sentences.translation: Dina je završila posao u pet sati popodne.
sentences.translationEn: Dina finished work at five o'clock in the evening.

sentences.translation: Ugasila je računar i sredila svoj sto.
sentences.translationEn: She closed the computer and tidied her desk.

sentences.translation: Pozdravila se s kolegicama i uzela svoju torbu.
sentences.translationEn: She said goodbye to her colleagues and took her bag.

sentences.arabic: غَادَرَتِ الْمَكْتَبَ وَتَوَجَّهَتْ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ مُسْرِعَةً.
sentences.translation: Napustila je kancelariju i požurila kući.
sentences.translationEn: She left the office and headed home quickly.
